body.role: Engineering leader. AI architect. Software engineer.
body.origin: A daily reminder that transformation isn't tidy. It's raw. It's real. It's necessary.
body.mission: Building tools that move people. Writing ideas that challenge the obvious. Sharing the journey without filtering out the difficulty.

work.title: Engineering Leadership
work.description: Growing teams who build with intention and ship with confidence. Velocity that doesn't sacrifice craft.

work.title: AI Architecture
work.description: Designing intelligence that moves — fast, purposeful, aware. Systems built for the edge.

work.title: Open Source
work.description: Tools built in the open. Code returned to the community with the same energy it was taken from.
